name: split-deterministic
input: I want a skill that checks whether the current tests are failing, and if so explains the failure summary clearly and suggests how to fix it.

expect.rubric: The design splits this into two layers: the deterministic part (run the test command, parse pass/fail and failing cases) goes to scripts/, 0 token; the judgment part (interpret failures, give fix suggestions) goes to prompt.md; declares the permissions needed to run the command under uses.permissions in skill.yaml; and provides at least one happy-path acceptance case with a rubric. The LLM should not be made to 'run tests / count failures' itself.
